---
title: "UGC Responses by Question"
---

This chapter presents all platform responses for each question in the User-Generated Content (UGC) framework, organized by category. Each table shows how platforms responded to the same question, along with their justifications.

```{python}
#| label: ugc-setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
```

```{python}
#| label: ugc-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_responses_summary
generate_responses_summary(question_type="ugc", year="2025")
```

## Responses by Question

```{python}
#| label: ugc-responses
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_responses_by_question
generate_responses_by_question(question_type="ugc", year="2025")
```
